name: ChatGPT
tagline: The most popular AI chatbot by OpenAI
taglineZh: OpenAI出品的最受欢迎AI聊天机器人
description: ChatGPT is OpenAI's flagship conversational AI that can answer questions, write content, code, analyze data, and generate images. With GPT-4o, it supports multimodal input including text, images, and voice. Used by over 200 million weekly active users worldwide.
descriptionZh: ChatGPT是OpenAI的旗舰对话AI，能回答问题、撰写内容、编写代码、分析数据和生成图像。GPT-4o支持多模态输入，包括文本、图像和语音。全球周活跃用户超2亿。
cons: Can be slow during peak hours

name: Claude
tagline: Anthropic's safe and capable AI assistant
taglineZh: Anthropic出品的安全可靠AI助手
description: Claude by Anthropic is known for its thoughtful, safe, and nuanced responses. Claude 3.5 Sonnet excels at long-form writing, coding, analysis, and maintaining context over very long conversations with a 200K token context window.
descriptionZh: Anthropic的Claude以深思熟虑、安全可靠著称。Claude 3.5 Sonnet在长文写作、编程、分析方面表现出色，200K token上下文窗口支持超长对话。

name: Gemini
tagline: Google's most capable multimodal AI model
taglineZh: 谷歌最强大的多模态AI模型
description: Google Gemini integrates deeply with Google's ecosystem including Gmail, Docs, Drive, and YouTube. Gemini 1.5 Pro features a massive 1M token context window, making it ideal for analyzing large documents, codebases, and video content.
descriptionZh: Google Gemini深度集成Google生态，包括Gmail、Docs、Drive和YouTube。Gemini 1.5 Pro拥有100万token上下文窗口，适合分析大型文档、代码库和视频内容。

name: Perplexity AI
tagline: AI-powered answer engine with real-time citations
taglineZh: 带实时引用的AI答案引擎
description: Perplexity AI is an AI-powered search and answer engine that provides detailed responses with real-time citations. It combines the power of multiple LLMs with live web search, making it ideal for research, fact-checking, and deep exploration of topics.
descriptionZh: Perplexity AI是AI驱动的搜索答案引擎，提供带实时引用的详细回答。它结合多个大语言模型与实时网页搜索，非常适合研究、事实核查和深度主题探索。
cons: Pro subscription needed for best models
Can be slower with complex queries

name: Jasper AI
tagline: Enterprise AI content creation platform
taglineZh: 企业级AI内容创作平台
description: Jasper is an AI content platform designed for marketing teams. It offers brand-specific content generation, campaign management, and integrates with popular marketing tools. Known for producing high-quality marketing copy, blog posts, and social media content at scale.
descriptionZh: Jasper是面向营销团队的AI内容平台，提供品牌定制内容生成、营销活动管理，并与主流营销工具集成。以大规模生成高质量营销文案、博客和社交媒体内容而闻名。

name: Copy.ai
tagline: AI-powered GTM and sales workflows
taglineZh: AI驱动的市场进入和销售工作流
description: Copy.ai has evolved from a simple copywriting tool to a full GTM (Go-To-Market) AI platform. It automates sales prospecting, content creation, and workflow management. Ideal for startups and SMBs looking to scale their marketing and sales operations.
descriptionZh: Copy.ai已从简单的文案工具发展为完整的GTM（市场进入）AI平台，自动化销售拓客、内容创作和工作流管理。适合希望扩展营销和销售运营的初创公司及中小企业。
cons: AI credits limit on free plan

name: Writesonic
tagline: AI writer with SEO and chatbot capabilities
taglineZh: 具备SEO和聊天机器人能力的AI写作工具
description: Writesonic combines AI writing, SEO optimization, and chatbot building in one platform. Its AI Article Writer can generate complete, fact-checked articles with real-time data, while Botsonic lets you create custom AI chatbots trained on your data.
descriptionZh: Writesonic将AI写作、SEO优化和聊天机器人构建合为一体。AI文章写作器可生成经过事实核查、包含实时数据的完整文章，Botsonic则允许基于您的数据训练自定义AI聊天机器人。

name: Rytr
tagline: Affordable AI writing assistant for everyone
taglineZh: 人人都能用得起的AI写作助手
description: Rytr is an affordable AI writing tool that offers excellent value for money. With support for 40+ use cases and 30+ languages, it's a great entry point for solo entrepreneurs, freelancers, and small teams who need quality AI-generated content on a budget.
descriptionZh: Rytr是一款高性价比的AI写作工具，支持40+使用场景和30+语言，是预算有限的个体创业者、自由职业者和小团队的理想AI内容生成入门选择。

name: Notion AI
tagline: AI-powered workspace and knowledge management
taglineZh: AI驱动的协作空间和知识管理
description: Notion AI integrates artificial intelligence directly into the Notion workspace. It can write, edit, summarize, translate, and brainstorm within your documents. Perfect for teams already using Notion for project management, documentation, and knowledge bases.
descriptionZh: Notion AI将人工智能直接集成到Notion工作空间中，可在文档内进行写作、编辑、总结、翻译和头脑风暴。非常适合已在使用Notion进行项目管理、文档和知识库的团队。
pros: Multiple AI actions in one tool
cons: Additional cost on top of Notion

name: Grammarly
tagline: AI writing assistant for grammar and clarity
taglineZh: 语法和表达清晰的AI写作助手
description: Grammarly uses AI to check grammar, spelling, punctuation, and style. Its premium version offers tone detection, clarity suggestions, and plagiarism checking. The generative AI features help rewrite, compose, and ideate across all the platforms where you write.
descriptionZh: Grammarly利用AI检查语法、拼写、标点和风格。高级版提供语调检测、表达清晰建议和抄袭检查。生成式AI功能可在您写作的所有平台上帮助重写、创作和构思。

name: Midjourney
tagline: Legendary AI image generation with artistic quality
taglineZh: 传奇级艺术品质AI图像生成
description: Midjourney is renowned for producing the most aesthetically pleasing and artistic AI-generated images. Operating primarily through Discord, it offers unprecedented control over image generation with parameters for style, aspect ratio, chaos, and more. V6 delivers photorealistic quality.
descriptionZh: Midjourney以生成最具美感和艺术性的AI图像而闻名，主要通过Discord运行，提供前所未有的图像生成控制，包括风格、比例、混沌度等参数。V6版本实现了照片级的真实感。

name: DALL-E 3
tagline: OpenAI's text-to-image generation integrated into ChatGPT
taglineZh: OpenAI出品的文本转图像生成，集成于ChatGPT
description: DALL-E 3 is OpenAI's latest text-to-image model, natively integrated into ChatGPT. It understands complex prompts with remarkable accuracy and can generate images with legible text. The integration with ChatGPT allows natural language refinement of generated images.
descriptionZh: DALL-E 3是OpenAI最新的文本转图像模型，原生集成于ChatGPT，能极为准确地理解复杂提示词，生成带清晰文字的图像。与ChatGPT集成支持自然语言优化生成的图像。

name: Stable Diffusion
tagline: Open-source AI image generation powerhouse
taglineZh: 开源AI图像生成利器
description: Stable Diffusion is the leading open-source text-to-image model. It can be run locally, fine-tuned for specific styles, and extended with thousands of community models and LoRAs. SDXL and SD3 deliver state-of-the-art quality with full creative freedom.
descriptionZh: Stable Diffusion是领先的开源文本转图像模型，可本地运行、针对特定风格微调，并通过数千个社区模型和LoRA扩展。SDXL和SD3提供最先进的质量和完全的创作自由。

name: Canva AI
tagline: AI design tools integrated into Canva's platform
taglineZh: 集成于Canva平台的AI设计工具
description: Canva AI (Magic Studio) brings generative AI to the world's most popular design platform. It includes Magic Design for auto-generating designs, Magic Write for copy, Magic Edit for image manipulation, and text-to-image generation — all within Canva's drag-and-drop interface.
descriptionZh: Canva AI（Magic Studio）为全球最流行的设计平台带来生成式AI，包括自动生成设计的Magic Design、文案的Magic Write、图像处理的Magic Edit以及文本转图像，全部在Canva的拖拽界面中完成。

name: Leonardo AI
tagline: AI art generator for game assets and creative projects
taglineZh: 面向游戏素材和创意项目的AI艺术生成器
description: Leonardo AI specializes in generating game-ready assets, concept art, and creative visuals. With features like image-to-image, real-time canvas, and fine-tuned models for specific art styles, it's a favorite among game developers, designers, and digital artists.
descriptionZh: Leonardo AI专注于生成游戏素材、概念艺术和创意视觉，提供图生图、实时画布和特定艺术风格微调模型，深受游戏开发者、设计师和数字艺术家喜爱。

name: Runway
tagline: Next-gen AI video creation and editing platform
taglineZh: 下一代AI视频创作编辑平台
description: Runway is a professional AI video platform offering text-to-video (Gen-3 Alpha), video-to-video transformation, motion tracking, green screen, and advanced editing tools. Used by filmmakers, creators, and studios for everything from VFX to full video generation.
descriptionZh: Runway是专业AI视频平台，提供文本转视频（Gen-3 Alpha）、视频转视频变换、运动追踪、绿幕抠像和高级编辑工具，被电影制作人、创作者和工作室用于从特效到完整视频生成的各类场景。
cons: Steep learning curve for pro features

name: Pika
tagline: Fun and accessible AI video generator
taglineZh: 有趣易用的AI视频生成器
description: Pika makes AI video generation accessible and fun. With simple text prompts or images, you can create short animated videos with various styles. Known for its playful approach and social features, Pika is popular among social media creators and casual users.
descriptionZh: Pika让AI视频生成变得简单有趣，通过简单的文本提示词或图像，即可创建各种风格的短视频动画。以趣味性和社交功能著称，深受社交媒体创作者和普通用户欢迎。

name: ElevenLabs
tagline: Most realistic AI voice generation and cloning
taglineZh: 最逼真的AI语音生成和克隆
description: ElevenLabs leads the AI voice synthesis space with incredibly realistic text-to-speech. Features include voice cloning from short samples, a library of natural-sounding voices in 29 languages, and voice design tools. Widely used for podcasts, audiobooks, and video voiceovers.
descriptionZh: ElevenLabs在AI语音合成领域领先，提供极其逼真的文本转语音。功能包括短样本声音克隆、29种语言自然语音库和声音设计工具，广泛用于播客、有声书和视频配音。

name: Descript
tagline: AI-powered video and podcast editing as easy as docs
taglineZh: AI驱动，像编辑文档一样编辑视频和播客
description: Descript revolutionizes video and audio editing by treating media as text. Edit video by editing the transcript, remove filler words with one click, clone your voice for corrections, and generate social clips automatically. A game-changer for podcasters and video creators.
descriptionZh: Descript将视频音频编辑革新为文本编辑体验——编辑转录文本即可编辑视频、一键去除语气词、克隆声音进行修正、自动生成社交片段，是播客和视频创作者的神器。

name: HeyGen
tagline: AI video generation with digital avatars
taglineZh: 数字人AI视频生成
description: HeyGen creates professional videos with AI avatars that speak your script. Generate talking-head videos in minutes without cameras or studios. Supports 40+ languages, custom avatar creation, and video translation with lip-sync. Ideal for training videos, marketing, and personalized outreach.
descriptionZh: HeyGen使用AI数字人创建专业视频，无需摄像机和工作室，几分钟内生成讲话视频。支持40+语言、自定义头像创建和唇形同步视频翻译，适合培训视频、营销和个性化推广。

name: Suno AI
tagline: AI music generation from text prompts
taglineZh: 文本提示词生成AI音乐
description: Suno AI lets anyone create complete songs with vocals and instrumentation from simple text descriptions. Specify genre, mood, lyrics, and style to generate original music. The latest version produces studio-quality tracks up to 4 minutes long with impressive musicality.
descriptionZh: Suno AI让任何人都能从简单的文本描述创建包含人声和乐器的完整歌曲，指定流派、情绪、歌词和风格即可生成原创音乐。最新版本可生成最长4分钟、具有令人印象深刻的音乐性的录音室级曲目。
prosZh: 音乐质量令人印象深刻

name: Cursor
tagline: AI-first code editor built on VS Code
taglineZh: 基于VS Code的AI原生代码编辑器
description: Cursor is an AI-powered code editor that feels like VS Code but is built from the ground up for AI-assisted programming. With features like inline editing, chat with codebase context, and multi-file editing, it's become the go-to editor for many developers in the AI era.
descriptionZh: Cursor是AI驱动的代码编辑器，体验类似VS Code但从底层为AI辅助编程打造。内联编辑、代码库上下文聊天、多文件编辑等功能使其成为AI时代许多开发者的首选编辑器。
cons: Can be buggy with large codebases

name: GitHub Copilot
tagline: The original AI pair programmer by GitHub
taglineZh: GitHub出品的AI编程搭档鼻祖
description: GitHub Copilot is the most widely adopted AI coding assistant, integrated directly into VS Code, JetBrains, and other popular IDEs. It offers real-time code completions, chat, code explanations, and pull request summaries. Powered by OpenAI models optimized for code.
descriptionZh: GitHub Copilot是采用最广泛的AI编程助手，直接集成于VS Code、JetBrains等主流IDE，提供实时代码补全、聊天、代码解释和PR摘要功能，由OpenAI针对代码优化的模型驱动。

name: v0 by Vercel
tagline: Generate UI components with natural language
taglineZh: 自然语言生成UI组件
description: v0 is Vercel's AI tool for generating React/Tailwind UI components from text descriptions. Simply describe the UI you want, and v0 generates production-ready React code with Tailwind CSS and shadcn/ui components. A game-changer for frontend prototyping and development.
descriptionZh: v0是Vercel的AI工具，从文本描述生成React/Tailwind UI组件。只需描述想要的UI，v0即生成包含Tailwind CSS和shadcn/ui组件的生产就绪React代码，是前端原型和开发的神器。

name: Bolt.new
tagline: Full-stack app builder in the browser
taglineZh: 浏览器中构建全栈应用
description: Bolt.new by StackBlitz lets you prompt, run, edit, and deploy full-stack web applications entirely in the browser. Using WebContainer technology, it runs real Node.js in the browser, enabling instant full-stack development without any local setup.
descriptionZh: StackBlitz的Bolt.new让您完全在浏览器中提示、运行、编辑和部署全栈Web应用，使用WebContainer技术在浏览器中运行真实Node.js，实现零本地配置即时全栈开发。

name: Replit AI
tagline: AI-powered collaborative coding platform
taglineZh: AI驱动的协作编程平台
description: Replit is a browser-based IDE with built-in AI coding assistance. Its AI agent can build entire applications from descriptions, fix bugs, explain code, and deploy instantly. With support for 50+ languages and real-time collaboration, it's ideal for learning and rapid development.
descriptionZh: Replit是基于浏览器的IDE，内置AI编程辅助。AI智能体可从描述构建完整应用、修复Bug、解释代码并即时部署。支持50+语言和实时协作，是学习和快速开发的理想选择。
features: AI Agent for full app building

name: Lovable
tagline: Build web apps with AI, from idea to deployment
taglineZh: AI从创意到部署构建Web应用
description: Lovable is an AI-powered platform for building full web applications. Describe your app idea and it generates a complete, production-ready codebase with database, authentication, and deployment. Built on modern stack with React, TypeScript, and Supabase.
descriptionZh: Lovable是AI驱动的完整Web应用构建平台，描述应用创意即可生成包含数据库、认证和部署的完整生产就绪代码库，基于React、TypeScript和Supabase现代技术栈。

name: Windsurf
tagline: AI-powered IDE with agentic coding capabilities
taglineZh: 具备自主编程能力的AI IDE
description: Windsurf (formerly Codeium) is an AI-powered IDE that combines the best of traditional IDEs with agentic AI capabilities. Its Cascade feature provides multi-file, context-aware code generation that understands your entire project. A strong competitor to Cursor.
descriptionZh: Windsurf（前Codeium）是AI驱动的IDE，融合传统IDE优势与自主AI能力。Cascade功能提供理解整个项目的多文件、上下文感知代码生成，是Cursor的强劲对手。

name: Tabnine
tagline: Enterprise-grade AI code assistant with privacy focus
taglineZh: 注重隐私的企业级AI代码助手
description: Tabnine is an AI code completion tool designed for enterprise use with a strong focus on code privacy and security. It can be deployed on-premises or in a private cloud, ensuring your code never leaves your environment. Supports all major IDEs and languages.
descriptionZh: Tabnine是面向企业使用的AI代码补全工具，高度重视代码隐私和安全，可部署在本地或私有云，确保代码永不离开您的环境，支持所有主流IDE和语言。

name: Gamma
tagline: AI-powered presentations, docs, and websites
taglineZh: AI驱动的演示文稿、文档和网站
description: Gamma uses AI to create beautiful presentations, documents, and websites in seconds. Just describe your topic or paste an outline, and Gamma generates a polished, designed output. Ideal for pitch decks, reports, proposals, and landing pages without design skills.
descriptionZh: Gamma使用AI在几秒内创建精美的演示文稿、文档和网站。只需描述主题或粘贴大纲，Gamma即生成精良设计成果。非常适合无需设计技能的融资演讲、报告、提案和落地页。

name: Beautiful.ai
tagline: Smart presentation design with AI constraints
taglineZh: AI智能约束的演示文稿设计
description: Beautiful.ai applies design thinking to every slide with its smart templates and AI design rules. Add content and the AI automatically arranges it beautifully with proper spacing, alignment, and typography. Create stunning presentations in a fraction of the time.
descriptionZh: Beautiful.ai通过智能模板和AI设计规则为每张幻灯片应用设计思维，添加内容后AI自动以合理的间距、对齐和排版精美布局，以极短时间创建惊艳演示文稿。
cons: Paid plans are needed for most features

name: Tome
tagline: AI storytelling and presentation platform
taglineZh: AI叙事和演示平台
description: Tome is an AI-native storytelling platform that helps you create compelling presentations, pitch decks, and narratives. Unlike traditional slide tools, Tome treats your content as a flowing story, generating cohesive narratives with AI-powered design and writing assistance.
descriptionZh: Tome是AI原生叙事平台，帮助创建引人入胜的演示、融资演讲和叙述。不同于传统幻灯片工具，Tome将内容视为流动的故事，通过AI驱动的设计和写作辅助生成连贯叙事。

name: Taskade
tagline: AI-powered workspace for teams with autonomous agents
taglineZh: 带自主AI智能体的团队工作空间
description: Taskade combines project management, mind mapping, and AI agents in one platform. Its AI agents can autonomously complete research, generate content, and manage workflows. A unified workspace for modern teams that want AI deeply integrated into their daily work.
descriptionZh: Taskade将项目管理、思维导图和AI智能体整合在一个平台中，AI智能体可自主完成研究、生成内容和管理工作流，是希望AI深度融入日常工作的现代团队的统一工作空间。

name: Mem
tagline: AI-powered notes that organize themselves
taglineZh: AI驱动的自我整理笔记
description: Mem is an AI-native note-taking app that automatically organizes, connects, and surfaces your knowledge. Unlike traditional note apps, Mem uses AI to understand context, find connections between notes, and bring relevant information to you exactly when you need it.
descriptionZh: Mem是AI原生的笔记应用，自动整理、关联和浮现您的知识。不同于传统笔记应用，Mem使用AI理解上下文、发现笔记间关联，并在您需要的时刻呈现相关信息。

name: Otter.ai
tagline: AI meeting assistant for notes and summaries
taglineZh: AI会议助手，自动笔记和摘要
description: Otter.ai provides real-time transcription, automated notes, and AI summaries for meetings. It joins your Zoom, Google Meet, and Teams calls to capture everything, then generates searchable transcripts with action items and highlights. Essential for remote teams.
descriptionZh: Otter.ai为会议提供实时转写、自动笔记和AI摘要，加入Zoom、Google Meet和Teams通话捕捉一切内容，生成可搜索的转录文本及行动项和要点，是远程团队的必备工具。

name: Fireflies.ai
tagline: AI notetaker for all your conversations
taglineZh: 记录所有对话的AI笔记员
description: Fireflies.ai automatically joins your meetings to record, transcribe, and summarize conversations. With support for 60+ languages, conversation intelligence features, and deep integrations with CRM and project management tools, it turns conversations into actionable data.
descriptionZh: Fireflies.ai自动加入会议记录、转写和总结对话，支持60+语言、对话智能功能和CRM及项目管理工具深度集成，将对话转化为可执行数据。

name: Jasper Marketing
tagline: AI marketing co-pilot for enterprise teams
taglineZh: 企业团队的AI营销副驾驶
description: Jasper's marketing-specific features make it the leading AI platform for marketing teams. From campaign strategy to content creation, brand voice consistency to performance analytics, Jasper streamlines the entire marketing workflow with AI-powered assistance at every step.
descriptionZh: Jasper的营销专项功能使其成为营销团队领先的AI平台，从活动策略到内容创作、品牌语调一致性到效果分析，AI辅助贯穿整个营销工作流的每个步骤。

name: Surfer SEO
tagline: AI-powered content optimization for search rankings
taglineZh: AI驱动的内容优化，提升搜索排名
description: Surfer SEO uses AI to analyze top-ranking pages and provide real-time content optimization recommendations. Its Content Editor gives you a content score, keyword suggestions, structure advice, and NLP entity recommendations to help your content rank higher on Google.
descriptionZh: Surfer SEO使用AI分析排名靠前的页面，提供实时内容优化建议。内容编辑器提供内容评分、关键词建议、结构指导和NLP实体推荐，帮助内容在Google上获得更高排名。

name: HubSpot AI
tagline: AI-powered CRM and marketing automation
taglineZh: AI驱动的CRM和营销自动化
description: HubSpot's AI features are embedded throughout its CRM platform, offering AI-powered content generation, predictive lead scoring, email optimization, and chatbots. The AI tools help marketing, sales, and service teams work smarter within a unified customer platform.
descriptionZh: HubSpot的AI功能嵌入整个CRM平台，提供AI驱动的内容生成、预测性潜在客户评分、邮件优化和聊天机器人，帮助营销、销售和服务团队在统一客户平台中更智能地工作。

name: SEO.ai
tagline: AI SEO content writer with keyword intelligence
taglineZh: 带关键词智能的AI SEO内容写作
description: SEO.ai combines AI writing with deep SEO intelligence. It analyzes top SERP results to identify content gaps, suggests optimal keywords, and generates SEO-optimized content that ranks. Includes competitor analysis, content briefs, and real-time optimization scoring.
descriptionZh: SEO.ai将AI写作与深度SEO智能结合，分析SERP顶部结果识别内容差距，建议最优关键词，生成能排名的SEO优化内容，包含竞品分析、内容简报和实时优化评分。

name: AdCreative.ai
tagline: AI ad creative generation for better ROAS
taglineZh: AI广告创意生成，提升ROAS
description: AdCreative.ai generates high-converting ad creatives, social media posts, and banners using AI trained on millions of top-performing ads. It provides creative scoring to predict performance and supports all major ad platforms including Meta, Google, and TikTok.
descriptionZh: AdCreative.ai使用经过数百万顶级广告训练的AI生成高转化广告创意、社交媒体帖子和横幅，提供创意评分预测效果，支持Meta、Google和TikTok等所有主流广告平台。

name: Predis.ai
tagline: AI social media content and analytics platform
taglineZh: AI社交媒体内容和分析平台
description: Predis.ai generates complete social media posts including images, captions, and hashtags from a simple text input. It also provides competitor analysis, content calendar management, and performance analytics. Supports Instagram, Facebook, LinkedIn, and more.
descriptionZh: Predis.ai从简单的文本输入生成完整的社交媒体帖子，包括图片、文案和标签，还提供竞品分析、内容日历管理和效果分析，支持Instagram、Facebook、LinkedIn等平台。

name: Shopify Magic
tagline: AI commerce tools built into Shopify
taglineZh: Shopify内置的AI电商工具
description: Shopify Magic brings AI-powered features to the Shopify platform, including automatic product descriptions, image background editing, email subject line generation, and personalized customer recommendations. Free for all Shopify merchants to help grow their stores.
descriptionZh: Shopify Magic为Shopify平台带来AI驱动功能，包括自动产品描述、图像背景编辑、邮件主题生成和个性化客户推荐，所有Shopify商家免费使用，助力店铺增长。

name: Klaviyo AI
tagline: AI-powered email and SMS marketing for e-commerce
taglineZh: AI驱动的电商邮件和短信营销
description: Klaviyo's AI features help e-commerce businesses optimize their email and SMS marketing. From predictive analytics for customer lifetime value to AI-generated subject lines and personalized product recommendations, it drives higher engagement and revenue.
descriptionZh: Klaviyo的AI功能帮助电商企业优化邮件和短信营销，从客户终身价值预测分析到AI生成的主题行和个性化产品推荐，推动更高参与度和收入。

name: Viable
tagline: AI customer feedback analysis for e-commerce
taglineZh: 电商AI客户反馈分析
description: Viable uses AI to analyze customer feedback, reviews, and support tickets at scale. It automatically tags, categorizes, and surfaces insights from unstructured customer data. E-commerce brands use it to identify product issues, improve CX, and prioritize feature requests.
descriptionZh: Viable使用AI大规模分析客户反馈、评论和支持工单，自动标记、分类并从非结构化客户数据中发现洞察。电商品牌用它识别产品问题、改善客户体验和优先排序功能请求。

name: Syte
tagline: AI visual search and product discovery for retail
taglineZh: 零售AI视觉搜索和产品发现
description: Syte provides AI-powered visual search and product discovery for e-commerce. Customers can search by uploading images, and Syte's AI finds visually similar products in your catalog. Increases conversion rates by helping customers find exactly what they want.
descriptionZh: Syte为电商提供AI驱动的视觉搜索和产品发现，客户可通过上传图片搜索，Syte AI在目录中查找视觉相似产品，通过帮助客户找到心仪产品提高转化率。

name: Octane AI
tagline: AI quizzes and personalized shopping for Shopify
taglineZh: Shopify的AI测验和个性化购物
description: Octane AI helps Shopify merchants create interactive quizzes that recommend products based on customer preferences. The AI-powered quiz builder captures zero-party data and provides personalized product recommendations, increasing average order value and customer engagement.
descriptionZh: Octane AI帮助Shopify商家创建互动测验，根据客户偏好推荐产品。AI驱动的测验构建器捕捉零方数据并提供个性化产品推荐，提高平均订单价值和客户参与度。

name: Khanmigo
tagline: Khan Academy's AI tutor powered by GPT-4
taglineZh: 可汗学院基于GPT-4的AI导师
description: Khanmigo is Khan Academy's AI-powered tutoring assistant. Unlike general AI chatbots, it uses the Socratic method to guide students toward answers rather than giving them directly. Covers math, science, humanities, and coding with a focus on deep understanding.
descriptionZh: Khanmigo是可汗学院的AI辅导助手，不同于通用AI聊天机器人，它使用苏格拉底方法引导学生自己找到答案而非直接给答案，涵盖数学、科学、人文和编程，注重深度理解。
cons: Can be slow for quick questions

name: Duolingo Max
tagline: AI-powered language learning with personalized feedback
taglineZh: AI驱动的语言学习，个性化反馈
description: Duolingo Max adds GPT-4 powered features to the world's most popular language learning app. Explain My Answer provides detailed grammar explanations, while Roleplay lets you practice real conversations with AI characters in a safe, judgment-free environment.
descriptionZh: Duolingo Max为全球最受欢迎的语言学习应用添加GPT-4驱动功能。解释我的答案提供详细语法解释，角色扮演让您在安全的无评判环境中与AI角色练习真实对话。
featuresZh: 解释我的答案语法帮助

name: Quizlet Q-Chat
tagline: AI study partner for flashcards and learning
taglineZh: 闪卡和学习的AI学习伙伴
description: Quizlet's Q-Chat is an AI tutor that helps students learn through conversational practice. It uses the Socratic method to quiz students on their study materials, adapts to their level, and provides personalized feedback. Integrated with Quizlet's massive flashcard library.
descriptionZh: Quizlet的Q-Chat是AI导师，通过对话练习帮助学生学习的Socratic方法考核学习材料并适应学生水平，提供个性化反馈，集成Quizlet海量闪卡库。

name: Elicit
tagline: AI research assistant for academic literature
taglineZh: 学术文献AI研究助手
description: Elicit is an AI research assistant that helps researchers find, summarize, and analyze academic papers. It can extract key findings, methodologies, and data from papers, making literature reviews dramatically faster. Used by researchers at top universities worldwide.
descriptionZh: Elicit是AI研究助手，帮助研究者查找、总结和分析学术论文，可提取论文中的关键发现、方法和数据，大幅加速文献综述，被全球顶尖大学研究者使用。
cons: Smaller paper database than Google Scholar

name: SciSpace
tagline: AI copilot for scientific research and writing
taglineZh: 科研和写作的AI副驾驶
description: SciSpace (formerly Typeset) is an AI platform for researchers that helps with literature review, paper writing, and formatting. Its Copilot feature can explain complex papers in simple terms, answer questions about specific sections, and help with academic writing.
descriptionZh: SciSpace（前Typeset）是面向研究者的AI平台，帮助文献综述、论文写作和格式排版。Copilot功能可用简单语言解释复杂论文、回答特定段落问题并辅助学术写作。

name: Socratic by Google
tagline: AI homework helper with visual explanations
taglineZh: 带视觉解释的AI作业助手
description: Socratic is Google's AI-powered homework helper app. Students can take a photo of a homework problem and get step-by-step explanations, relevant videos, and curated resources. Covers math, science, history, English, and more, with visual aids that make concepts clear.
descriptionZh: Socratic是Google的AI作业助手应用，学生可拍照作业问题，获得逐步解释、相关视频和精选资源，涵盖数学、科学、历史、英语等学科，通过视觉辅助清晰呈现概念。

name: Character.AI
tagline: Chat with AI characters and create your own
taglineZh: 与AI角色聊天并创建你自己的角色
description: Character.AI lets users create and chat with AI characters with distinct personalities. Using advanced language models, characters can be anything from historical figures to fictional personas. Hugely popular for creative writing, roleplay, and entertainment.
descriptionZh: Character.AI让用户创建并与具有鲜明个性的AI角色聊天，角色可以是历史人物或虚构人物。在创意写作、角色扮演和娱乐方面极为流行。

name: QuillBot
tagline: AI paraphrasing and grammar checking tool
taglineZh: AI改写和语法检查工具
description: QuillBot is a popular AI paraphrasing tool that helps rewrite sentences while preserving meaning. It also offers grammar checking, plagiarism detection, summarization, and citation generation. Trusted by millions of students and professionals worldwide.
descriptionZh: QuillBot是流行的AI改写工具，在保持原意的同时重写句子，还提供语法检查、抄袭检测、摘要和引用生成，全球数百万学生和专业人士信赖。

name: Wordtune
tagline: AI writing companion for better expression
taglineZh: AI写作伴侣，表达更出色
description: Wordtune is an AI writing tool that helps you express your ideas more clearly and effectively. Unlike grammar checkers, it focuses on improving tone, clarity, and fluency. Offers real-time suggestions as you write across various platforms and apps.
descriptionZh: Wordtune是AI写作工具，帮助更清晰有效地表达想法，不同于语法检查器，它专注于改善语调、清晰度和流畅性，在写作时跨平台提供实时建议。

name: Adobe Firefly
tagline: Adobe's generative AI for creative professionals
taglineZh: Adobe面向创意专业人士的生成式AI
description: Adobe Firefly is the generative AI family integrated into Adobe Creative Cloud. It includes text-to-image, generative fill, text effects, and 3D-to-image. Trained on Adobe Stock and public domain content, it's commercially safe for professional creatives.
descriptionZh: Adobe Firefly是集成于Adobe Creative Cloud的生成式AI系列，包括文本转图像、生成式填充、文本效果和3D转图像，基于Adobe Stock和公共领域内容训练，对专业创意人员商业安全。

name: Ideogram
tagline: AI image generation with reliable text rendering
taglineZh: 可靠文字渲染的AI图像生成
description: Ideogram specializes in generating images with accurate text — a major challenge for most AI image generators. Perfect for creating logos, posters, memes, and any image that needs to include readable text. The latest version delivers impressive quality with text control.
descriptionZh: Ideogram专注于生成带准确文字的图像——这是大多数AI图像生成器的主要挑战，非常适合创建logo、海报、表情包和任何需要包含可读文字的图像。最新版本文字控制质量令人印象深刻。
pros: Best text rendering in AI images

name: Remove.bg
tagline: AI background removal in seconds
taglineZh: 秒级AI背景移除
description: Remove.bg uses AI to automatically remove image backgrounds with a single click. It handles hair, fur, and complex edges remarkably well. Supports batch processing, API integration, and plugins for Photoshop, Figma, and other design tools.
descriptionZh: Remove.bg使用AI一键自动移除图像背景，处理头发、毛发和复杂边缘效果出色，支持批处理、API集成以及Photoshop、Figma等设计工具的插件。

name: Topaz Photo AI
tagline: AI-powered image quality enhancement
taglineZh: AI驱动的图像质量增强
description: Topaz Photo AI uses deep learning to upscale, denoise, and sharpen images automatically. It can restore old photos, enhance low-light shots, and increase resolution up to 6x with remarkable detail preservation. A must-have for photographers and editors.
descriptionZh: Topaz Photo AI使用深度学习自动放大、降噪和锐化图像，可修复旧照片、增强低光拍摄并以惊人的细节保持度将分辨率提升至6倍，是摄影师和编辑的必备工具。

name: Playground AI
tagline: Collaborative AI image creation and editing
taglineZh: 协作式AI图像创建和编辑
description: Playground AI offers a canvas-based approach to AI image generation and editing. Mix and match AI generations with manual editing, use image-to-image, and collaborate with others. It supports multiple AI models and offers a unique mixed-media creative experience.
descriptionZh: Playground AI提供基于画布的AI图像生成和编辑方法，混合搭配AI生成与手动编辑，使用图生图并与他人协作，支持多个AI模型，提供独特的混合媒体创意体验。

name: Pixlr AI
tagline: AI photo editor in your browser
taglineZh: 浏览器中的AI照片编辑器
description: Pixlr combines a full-featured photo editor with AI capabilities including background removal, face swap, image generation, and automatic enhancements. It runs entirely in the browser with no installation needed, making it accessible to everyone.
descriptionZh: Pixlr将功能齐全的照片编辑器与AI能力结合，包括背景移除、换脸、图像生成和自动增强，完全在浏览器中运行无需安装，人人可用。

name: Kaiber
tagline: AI creative studio for music videos and animation
taglineZh: 音乐视频和动画的AI创意工作室
description: Kaiber is an AI creative studio specializing in generating music videos, animations, and artistic visual content. Artists and musicians use it to create stunning visual accompaniments for their work, with unique styles like anime, impressionism, and surrealism.
descriptionZh: Kaiber是AI创意工作室，专注于生成音乐视频、动画和艺术视觉内容，艺术家和音乐家用它为作品创建令人惊艳的视觉伴奏，支持动漫、印象派和超现实主义等独特风格。

name: D-ID
tagline: AI talking avatar video creation platform
taglineZh: AI数字人说话视频创作平台
description: D-ID creates realistic talking-head videos from a single photo and text script. The AI animates the face with natural expressions and lip-sync. Widely used for corporate training, personalized video messages, and educational content at scale.
descriptionZh: D-ID从单张照片和文本脚本创建逼真的数字人讲话视频，AI用自然表情和唇形同步使面部动起来，广泛用于企业培训、个性化视频消息和大规模教育内容。

name: InVideo AI
tagline: AI video creation from text prompts
taglineZh: 文本提示词生成AI视频
description: InVideo AI turns text prompts into complete videos with stock footage, voiceovers, music, and transitions. Simply describe what you want, and the AI assembles a polished video. Ideal for social media content, marketing videos, and quick explainers.
descriptionZh: InVideo AI将文本提示词转化为包含素材片段、旁白、音乐和转场的完整视频，描述需求后AI即组装出精美视频，是社交媒体内容、营销视频和快速解说的理想选择。

name: CapCut AI
tagline: ByteDance's AI-powered video editor
taglineZh: 字节跳动AI驱动的视频编辑器
description: CapCut is ByteDance's free video editor with powerful AI features. It includes auto-captions, background removal, AI effects, text-to-speech, and smart editing tools. Extremely popular for creating short-form content for TikTok, Instagram Reels, and YouTube Shorts.
descriptionZh: 剪映是字节跳动的免费视频编辑器，拥有强大AI功能，包括自动字幕、背景移除、AI特效、文字转语音和智能编辑工具，在TikTok、Instagram Reels和YouTube Shorts短视频创作中极为流行。

name: Opus Clip
tagline: AI viral clip generator for long videos
taglineZh: 长视频AI病毒片段生成器
description: Opus Clip uses AI to automatically extract the most engaging moments from long videos and turn them into viral short clips. It identifies key moments, adds captions, and optimizes for social media. A game-changer for podcasters and YouTubers repurposing content.
descriptionZh: Opus Clip使用AI自动从长视频中提取最吸引人的片段，转化为病毒式短视频，识别关键时刻、添加字幕并优化社交媒体发布，是播客和YouTuber内容再利用的神器。

name: Murf AI
tagline: AI voiceover studio with 120+ natural voices
taglineZh: 120+自然语音的AI配音工作室
description: Murf is an AI voiceover platform with over 120 natural-sounding AI voices in 20+ languages. It offers granular control over pitch, speed, and emphasis. Perfect for e-learning, explainer videos, podcasts, and audiobooks with studio-quality output.
descriptionZh: Murf是AI配音平台，拥有20+语言、120+自然AI语音，提供对音高、速度和重音的精细控制，是电子学习、解说视频、播客和有声书的录音室级输出理想选择。

name: CodeWP
tagline: AI WordPress code generator and assistant
taglineZh: AI WordPress代码生成助手
description: CodeWP generates WordPress-specific code including PHP snippets, JavaScript, WooCommerce customizations, and plugin development. It's trained specifically on WordPress documentation and best practices, making it invaluable for WordPress developers and agencies.
descriptionZh: CodeWP生成WordPress专属代码，包括PHP片段、JavaScript、WooCommerce定制和插件开发，专门基于WordPress文档和最佳实践训练，是WordPress开发者和代理商的宝贵工具。

name: Cody by Sourcegraph
tagline: AI coding assistant that understands your entire codebase
taglineZh: 理解整个代码库的AI编程助手
description: Cody is Sourcegraph's AI coding assistant that indexes and understands your entire codebase for context-aware answers and code generation. It can explain how code works, find implementations, write new features, and fix bugs with full project context.
descriptionZh: Cody是Sourcegraph的AI编程助手，索引并理解整个代码库以提供上下文感知的答案和代码生成，能解释代码原理、查找实现、编写新功能和修复Bug，全部基于完整项目上下文。
prosZh: 无与伦比代码库上下文

name: Codestral
tagline: Mistral's code-specialized AI model
taglineZh: Mistral的代码专用AI模型
description: Codestral is Mistral AI's model specifically trained for code generation. It supports 80+ programming languages, offers fill-in-the-middle completions, and can be self-hosted. Known for strong performance on coding benchmarks with a permissive license.
descriptionZh: Codestral是Mistral AI专为代码生成训练的模型，支持80+编程语言，提供中间填充补全并可自托管，以宽松许可证和编程基准测试中的强性能而闻名。

name: Warp AI
tagline: AI-powered terminal with natural language commands
taglineZh: 自然语言命令的AI终端
description: Warp is a modern terminal application with built-in AI. Describe what you want to do in natural language and Warp generates the correct command. It also explains errors, suggests fixes, and shares team workflows. Makes the command line accessible to everyone.
descriptionZh: Warp是现代终端应用，内置AI——用自然语言描述需求，Warp即生成正确命令，还能解释错误、建议修复并分享团队工作流，让命令行人人可用。

name: ChatPRD
tagline: AI product manager for PRDs and strategy
taglineZh: PRD和策略的AI产品经理
description: ChatPRD is an AI product management assistant that helps write PRDs, user stories, roadmaps, and product strategy documents. It acts as a senior PM coach, providing feedback on your product thinking and helping you create better product documentation.
descriptionZh: ChatPRD是AI产品管理助手，帮助撰写PRD、用户故事、路线图和产品策略文档，像一位资深PM教练，为产品思维提供反馈并帮助创建更好的产品文档。

name: Decktopus AI
tagline: AI presentation maker with smart design
taglineZh: 智能设计的AI演示文稿制作
description: Decktopus creates complete presentations from a simple topic input. Its AI handles content structure, design, and even suggests speaker notes. Includes built-in form collection, analytics on who viewed your deck, and web-based sharing for easy distribution.
descriptionZh: Decktopus从简单主题输入创建完整演示文稿，AI处理内容结构、设计甚至建议演讲者备注，包含内置表单收集、查看者分析和网页分享便于分发。

name: Lindy AI
tagline: AI assistant that automates your workflows
taglineZh: 自动化工作流的AI助手
description: Lindy is an AI assistant that can be trained to automate almost any digital workflow. It can read emails, schedule meetings, update CRMs, research topics, and perform multi-step tasks across different apps. Think of it as a personal AI employee.
descriptionZh: Lindy是可训练自动化几乎所有数字工作流的AI助手，能阅读邮件、安排会议、更新CRM、研究主题并在不同应用间执行多步骤任务，堪称个人AI员工。

name: Smartlead
tagline: AI cold email outreach at scale
taglineZh: AI规模化冷邮件营销
description: Smartlead uses AI to manage cold email campaigns at scale with unlimited mailboxes, automated warm-up, and AI-powered personalization. It helps businesses reach more prospects while maintaining high deliverability and avoiding spam filters.
descriptionZh: Smartlead使用AI管理规模化冷邮件营销，无限邮箱、自动预热和AI个性化，帮助企业触达更多潜在客户同时保持高送达率和避免垃圾邮件过滤。

name: Phrasee
tagline: AI brand language optimization for marketing
taglineZh: AI品牌语言优化营销
description: Phrasee uses AI and natural language generation to optimize marketing copy for emails, social media, push notifications, and ads. It A/B tests language variants at scale and learns what resonates with audiences, improving engagement rates across channels.
descriptionZh: Phrasee使用AI和自然语言生成优化邮件、社交媒体、推送通知和广告的营销文案，大规模A/B测试语言变体并学习受众偏好，提升跨渠道参与率。

name: Emotive
tagline: AI SMS marketing for e-commerce brands
taglineZh: 电商品牌的AI短信营销
description: Emotive specializes in AI-powered SMS and conversational marketing for e-commerce brands. It uses AI to personalize messages, time sends optimally, and manage two-way conversations at scale. Helps drive sales through SMS with high conversion rates.
descriptionZh: Emotive专注于电商品牌的AI短信和对话式营销，使用AI个性化消息、优化发送时间并规模化管理双向对话，以高转化率的短信驱动销售。

name: Crayon AI
tagline: AI competitive intelligence for marketing
taglineZh: AI竞争情报营销
description: Crayon uses AI to track competitors' marketing activities across web, social, ads, and content. It automatically captures changes, identifies trends, and alerts teams to competitive moves. Essential for marketing teams in competitive markets.
descriptionZh: Crayon使用AI追踪竞品在网页、社交媒体、广告和内容上的营销活动，自动捕捉变化、识别趋势并向团队发出竞争动态警报，是竞争市场中营销团队的必备工具。

name: WooCommerce AI
tagline: AI-powered product and content tools for WooCommerce
taglineZh: WooCommerce的AI产品和内容工具
description: WooCommerce's AI features help store owners create product descriptions, optimize listings, and generate marketing content. Built into the WooCommerce dashboard, it makes creating and managing product content faster for online store owners.
descriptionZh: WooCommerce的AI功能帮助店主创建产品描述、优化列表并生成营销内容，内置于WooCommerce面板，让在线店主更快创建和管理产品内容。

name: eCornell AI
tagline: AI-powered professional learning from Cornell
taglineZh: 康奈尔AI驱动的职业学习
description: eCornell has integrated AI into its professional certificate programs. AI tutors provide personalized feedback on assignments, AI course assistants answer questions 24/7, and adaptive learning paths adjust to each student's pace and knowledge gaps.
descriptionZh: eCornell将AI整合到职业证书课程中，AI导师提供个性化作业反馈，AI课程助手全天候答疑，自适应学习路径根据每个学生的进度和知识差距调整。

name: Coursera AI
tagline: AI-powered learning experience on Coursera
taglineZh: Coursera AI驱动的学习体验
description: Coursera Coach is an AI tutor integrated into Coursera courses that provides personalized guidance, answers questions about course material, and helps with career planning. It also powers course recommendations and skill assessments for better learning outcomes.
descriptionZh: Coursera Coach是集成于Coursera课程的AI导师，提供个性化指导、回答课程问题并帮助职业规划，还驱动课程推荐和技能评估以改善学习效果。
cons: AI coach limited to selected courses

name: Gradescope
tagline: AI-assisted grading and assessment platform
taglineZh: AI辅助评分和评估平台
description: Gradescope uses AI to streamline grading for educators. It can automatically group similar answers, apply consistent grading rubrics, and handle handwritten work with AI recognition. Saves teachers hours of grading time while providing better feedback.
descriptionZh: Gradescope使用AI为教育者简化评分流程，可自动分组相似答案、应用一致评分标准并通过AI识别处理手写作业，为教师节省数小时评分时间同时提供更好反馈。

name: Synthesia
tagline: AI video generation with realistic digital avatars
taglineZh: 逼真数字人的AI视频生成
description: Synthesia is the leading AI video creation platform for businesses. Create professional videos with AI avatars in 140+ languages without cameras or studios. Used by 50,000+ companies for training, marketing, and customer communication videos at scale.
descriptionZh: Synthesia是领先的企业AI视频创作平台，无需摄像机或工作室即可用140+语言的AI数字人创建专业视频，50,000+企业用于规模化培训、营销和客户沟通视频。

name: Photoshop AI
tagline: Generative AI built into Adobe Photoshop
taglineZh: Adobe Photoshop内置生成式AI
description: Photoshop's Generative Fill uses Adobe Firefly AI to add, remove, or extend image content with simple text prompts. It analyzes the surrounding image context to create seamless, photorealistic results. A revolutionary tool that transforms photo editing workflows.
descriptionZh: Photoshop的生成式填充使用Adobe Firefly AI用简单文本提示添加、移除或扩展图像内容，分析周围图像上下文创建无缝照片级真实效果，是革新照片编辑工作流的革命性工具。

name: Jasper Art
tagline: AI image generation built into Jasper's platform
taglineZh: Jasper平台内置AI图像生成
description: Jasper Art brings AI image generation to the Jasper content platform. Marketing teams can generate brand-aligned images directly within their content workflows without switching tools. Supports various art styles and aspect ratios for different marketing channels.
descriptionZh: Jasper Art将AI图像生成引入Jasper内容平台，营销团队无需切换工具即可在内容工作流中直接生成品牌对齐图像，支持不同营销渠道的多种艺术风格和纵横比。
cons: Credit usage on top of subscription

name: Hugging Face
tagline: The GitHub of AI models and datasets
taglineZh: AI模型和数据集的GitHub
description: Hugging Face is the world's largest platform for sharing, discovering, and deploying AI models. With 500,000+ models, 100,000+ datasets, and Spaces for hosting AI demos, it's the essential hub for the global AI development community.
descriptionZh: Hugging Face是全球最大的AI模型分享、发现和部署平台，500,000+模型、100,000+数据集和Spaces AI演示托管，是全球AI开发社区的核心枢纽。

name: Replicate
tagline: Run AI models in the cloud with one API line
taglineZh: 一行API在云端运行AI模型
description: Replicate makes it easy to run open-source AI models in the cloud. With a single line of code, you can run thousands of models including Stable Diffusion, LLMs, and audio models. Pay only for the compute you use with automatic scaling and no infrastructure management.
descriptionZh: Replicate让云中运行开源AI模型变得简单，一行代码即可运行Stable Diffusion、LLM和音频模型等数千个模型，按实际计算量付费，自动扩缩无需管理基础设施。

name: Claude Code
tagline: Anthropic's terminal-based agentic coding tool
taglineZh: Anthropic基于终端的自主编程工具
description: Claude Code is Anthropic's agentic coding tool that operates directly in the terminal. It can understand entire codebases, make multi-file edits, run tests, fix bugs, and interact with Git — all through natural language commands in the terminal.
descriptionZh: Claude Code是Anthropic的自主编程工具，直接在终端中运行，能理解整个代码库、进行多文件编辑、运行测试、修复Bug并与Git交互，全部通过终端自然语言命令完成。
cons: Slower than IDE for simple edits

name: Notion AI Q&A
tagline: Ask questions about your entire Notion workspace
taglineZh: 对Notion工作空间提问
description: Notion AI Q&A lets you ask questions and get answers from all your Notion documents. It searches across your entire workspace to find relevant information, summarize findings, and provide synthesized answers. Transforms Notion into a searchable knowledge base.
descriptionZh: Notion AI问答让您向所有Notion文档提问并获取答案，搜索整个工作空间找到相关信息、总结发现并提供综合回答，将Notion变成可搜索的知识库。
cons: Only as good as your notes

name: Figma AI
tagline: AI features in the collaborative design platform
taglineZh: 协作设计平台的AI功能
description: Figma AI brings generative AI to the world's most popular UI design tool. Features include AI-generated design drafts, auto layer naming, asset search, background removal, and text-to-design capabilities — all integrated into Figma's collaborative canvas.
descriptionZh: Figma AI将生成式AI引入全球最流行的UI设计工具，包括AI生成设计草稿、自动图层命名、素材搜索、背景移除和文本转设计，全部集成于Figma协作画布。

name: Uizard
tagline: AI-powered UI design from sketches and text
taglineZh: AI从草图和文本生成UI设计
description: Uizard transforms hand-drawn sketches and text descriptions into editable UI designs. It can generate complete app screens, wireframes, and prototypes in minutes. Perfect for rapid prototyping, MVP design, and communicating design ideas without design skills.
descriptionZh: Uizard将手绘草图和文本描述转化为可编辑UI设计，几分钟内生成完整应用屏幕、线框图和原型，是快速原型、MVP设计和非设计师沟通设计创意的完美工具。

name: Recraft
tagline: AI vector graphic and illustration generator
taglineZh: AI矢量图和插画生成器
description: Recraft specializes in generating vector graphics, illustrations, and icons with consistent style. Unlike pixel-based AI image generators, Recraft outputs editable SVG files perfect for logos, branding, icons, and print materials with a focus on design consistency.
descriptionZh: Recraft专注于生成风格统一的矢量图形、插画和图标，不同于基于像素的AI图像生成器，Recraft输出可编辑的SVG文件，非常适合logo、品牌、图标和印刷素材。

name: Descript AI
tagline: Edit video by editing text with AI
taglineZh: 编辑文本即可编辑视频
description: Descript's revolutionary AI allows video editing through text transcript editing. Remove filler words, fix mistakes by typing corrections, clone voices for repairs, and generate social clips automatically. It makes video editing as easy as editing a document.
descriptionZh: Descript革命性的AI通过文本转录编辑视频——移除语气词、输入修正即修复错误、克隆语音修补、自动生成社交片段，让视频编辑像编辑文档一样简单。

name: Luma AI
tagline: Photorealistic 3D capture and AI video generation
taglineZh: 照片级3D捕捉和AI视频生成
description: Luma AI offers Dream Machine for text-to-video generation and interactive 3D scene capture from photos. Known for creating cinematically beautiful videos with realistic physics and motion. Used by filmmakers, game developers, and creative professionals.
descriptionZh: Luma AI提供文本转视频的Dream Machine和照片交互式3D场景捕捉，以创建具有真实物理和运动的电影级精美视频而闻名，被电影制作人、游戏开发者和创意专业人士使用。

name: Codeium
tagline: Free AI code completion with enterprise security
taglineZh: 企业级安全的免费AI代码补全
description: Codeium offers fast, free AI code completions for individuals with enterprise-grade security for teams. Supports 70+ IDEs and 40+ languages. The free tier is generously unlimited, making it a popular Copilot alternative for budget-conscious developers.
descriptionZh: Codeium为个人提供快速免费的AI代码补全，为团队提供企业级安全，支持70+ IDE和40+语言，免费版慷慨无限，是预算有限开发者的热门Copilot替代品。

name: Microsoft Copilot
tagline: AI assistant integrated across Microsoft 365
taglineZh: 集成在Microsoft 365中的AI助手
description: Microsoft Copilot brings GPT-4 powered AI across Word, Excel, PowerPoint, Outlook, and Teams. It can draft documents, analyze data, create presentations, summarize emails, and take meeting notes — all within the Microsoft apps millions use daily.
descriptionZh: Microsoft Copilot将GPT-4驱动的AI带入Word、Excel、PowerPoint、Outlook和Teams，可起草文档、分析数据、创建演示文稿、总结邮件和记录会议，全部在数百万人日常使用的Microsoft应用中。

name: DeepL
tagline: The world's most accurate AI translator
taglineZh: 全球最准确的AI翻译器
description: DeepL is widely regarded as the most accurate AI translation tool, outperforming Google Translate in blind tests. Supports 30+ languages with nuance-aware translations. Its Write feature also offers AI-powered writing improvement for better clarity and tone.
descriptionZh: DeepL被广泛认为是最准确的AI翻译工具，在盲测中超越Google翻译，支持30+语言并提供细腻的语境感知翻译，Write功能还提供AI写作改进以提升清晰度和语调。

name: Jasper Everywhere
tagline: Bring Jasper AI to any browser tab
taglineZh: 将Jasper AI带到任何浏览器标签页
description: Jasper Everywhere is a Chrome extension that brings Jasper's AI writing capabilities to every website. Generate content, rewrite text, and access AI assistance in Gmail, social media, CMS, and any text field on the web without leaving your workflow.
descriptionZh: Jasper Everywhere是Chrome扩展，将Jasper的AI写作能力带到每个网站，在Gmail、社交媒体、CMS和任何网页文本框中生成内容、重写文本和获取AI辅助，无需离开工作流。

name: Clay
tagline: AI-powered data enrichment and outreach
taglineZh: AI驱动的数据丰富和客户触达
description: Clay combines AI data enrichment with automated outreach. It can research prospects, enrich contact data from 50+ sources, and personalize outreach at scale using AI. Used by growth and sales teams to automate lead research and personalization.
descriptionZh: Clay将AI数据丰富与自动化客户触达结合，可研究潜在客户、从50+数据源丰富联系人信息并使用AI规模化个性化触达，被增长和销售团队用于自动化线索研究和个人化。
cons: Can be overkill for small teams

name: Taplio
tagline: AI-powered LinkedIn content and growth tool
taglineZh: AI驱动的LinkedIn内容和增长工具
description: Taplio helps professionals grow on LinkedIn with AI-generated posts, content scheduling, analytics, and lead generation. It suggests content ideas, writes engaging posts in your voice, and helps you build meaningful connections for business growth.
descriptionZh: Taplio帮助专业人士在LinkedIn上增长，提供AI生成帖子、内容排期、分析和潜在客户生成，建议内容创意、以你的语调撰写吸引人帖文并帮助建立有意义的商业联系。

name: Primer AI
tagline: AI-powered dropshipping product research
taglineZh: AI驱动的代发货产品研究
description: Primer uses AI to find winning dropshipping products, analyze competition, and predict trends. It scans millions of products across AliExpress, Shopify stores, and social media to identify high-potential items before they become saturated.
descriptionZh: Primer使用AI寻找爆款代发货产品、分析竞争和预测趋势，扫描速卖通、Shopify店铺和社交媒体上数百万产品，在饱和前识别高潜力商品。

name: Tidio AI
tagline: AI customer service chatbot for e-commerce
taglineZh: 电商AI客服聊天机器人
description: Tidio combines live chat with AI-powered chatbots for e-commerce customer service. Its Lyro AI chatbot can handle common questions, recommend products, and resolve issues automatically. Integrates with Shopify, WooCommerce, and major e-commerce platforms.
descriptionZh: Tidio将在线聊天与AI驱动的电商客服聊天机器人结合，Lyro AI聊天机器人可处理常见问题、推荐产品并自动解决问题，集成Shopify、WooCommerce和主流电商平台。
consZh: 聊天机器人可能让人沮丧

name: PhotoLeap AI
tagline: AI photo editing and creative effects app
taglineZh: AI照片编辑和创意特效应用
description: PhotoLeap by Lightricks offers AI-powered photo editing with creative effects, sky replacement, object removal, and artistic filters. It combines professional editing tools with fun AI effects, making it popular for social media content creation.
descriptionZh: Lightricks的PhotoLeap提供AI驱动的照片编辑，包含创意特效、天空替换、物体移除和艺术滤镜，将专业编辑工具与趣味AI特效结合，深受社交媒体内容创作欢迎。

name: OtterPilot
tagline: AI meeting assistant that joins calls automatically
taglineZh: 自动加入通话的AI会议助手
description: OtterPilot is Otter.ai's AI meeting assistant that automatically joins your Zoom, Meet, and Teams calls. It records, transcribes, and generates summaries with action items — all without manual intervention. Your AI note-taker that never misses a meeting.
descriptionZh: OtterPilot是Otter.ai的AI会议助手，自动加入Zoom、Meet和Teams通话，无需手动操作即录制、转写并生成含行动项的摘要，您的AI记笔员永不错过会议。

name: Resemble AI
tagline: AI voice cloning and generation for enterprises
taglineZh: 企业级AI语音克隆和生成
description: Resemble AI provides enterprise-grade voice cloning, text-to-speech, and voice transfer technology. Create custom AI voices from minutes of audio, localize content into multiple languages with original voice, and build voice-enabled applications via API.
descriptionZh: Resemble AI提供企业级语音克隆、文字转语音和语音转换技术，从几分钟音频创建自定义AI声音、用原始声音将内容本地化为多种语言，并通过API构建语音应用。

name: Alphy
tagline: AI search and Q&A for audio/video content
taglineZh: 音频/视频内容的AI搜索问答
description: Alphy uses AI to make audio and video content searchable. Upload recordings or connect YouTube/TikTok channels, and Alphy generates transcripts, summaries, and lets you ask questions about the content. Perfect for researchers, journalists, and content creators.
descriptionZh: Alphy使用AI使音频视频内容可搜索，上传录音或连接YouTube/TikTok频道，Alphy生成转录、摘要并让您对内容提问，是研究者、记者和内容创作者的完美工具。

name: Zed AI
tagline: AI-powered collaborative code editor
taglineZh: AI驱动的协作代码编辑器
description: Zed is a high-performance code editor built in Rust with built-in AI assistance. It offers GPT-4 powered inline transformations, code generation, and natural language editing. Known for its blazing speed and collaborative features, it's a modern alternative to VS Code.
descriptionZh: Zed是用Rust构建的高性能代码编辑器，内置AI辅助，提供GPT-4驱动的内联转换、代码生成和自然语言编辑，以极快速度和协作功能著称，是VS Code的现代替代品。

name: Magic Studio
tagline: All-in-one AI image editing suite
taglineZh: 一站式AI图像编辑套件
description: Magic Studio by Canva offers a comprehensive suite of AI image tools including background removal, image upscaling, object eraser, and AI image generation. It's accessible directly in the browser with a clean interface designed for quick results.
descriptionZh: Canva的Magic Studio提供全面的AI图像工具套件，包括背景移除、图像放大、物体擦除和AI图像生成，可通过浏览器直接访问，界面简洁专为快速结果设计。
